name: experiment_2026-04-22_router_diag_bull
description: Diagnostic router for cycle40 detector emission analysis. default = sl6 (so 'unknown / fall-through' lands on sl6). bull-trend override = sl14. If the detector commits bull-trend on the run, results match sl14 flat. If it commits Unknown, results match sl6 flat. Anything else = some regime in between.
